en: Australian accent's one of those accents that's funny every single time.
ko: 호주 억양은 매번 웃기는 억양 중 하나야.

en: You could be in the middle of a fucking tragedy if you heard an Australian accent, you'd still be like...
ko: 비극 한가운데 있어도 호주 억양 들으면 그냥...

en: Like if there was an Australian guy in the office on 9-11...
He's like, oh fuck, look out!
Oh no, there's another one, get down!
Oh fuck, it's hot up here, gonna have to jump out!
ko: 아 씨발, 여기 너무 덥다, 뛰어내려야겠다!
